title: vulpia myuros
intro: Vulpia myuros, also known as slender false brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive problems, as well as reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Vulpia myuros can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in folk medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
